chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-8904 of 2018 Nisar Ali Abbasi Versus Federation of Pakistan & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.39173/18 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 08.11.2021 None for petitioner. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi for respondent. -.-.- Although petitioner’s counsel is not in attendance, this petition seems to be covered by a judgment reported as 2018 PTD 621 as apparently pre-suspension notice in relation to sales tax registration has not been issued. Let reasoning, rational and the conclusion in the aforesaid judgment be applied mutatis mutandis to the instant petition as well. Petition, along with listed application, stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge
